title: Spider droid (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:SpiderDroids-Droidography.png|thumb|right|250px|A homing spider droid and two dwarf spider droids.]]
'''Spider droid''' was a term for [[droid]]s that resembled [[spider]]s. It was also a general term referring to a many of the [[Battle droid]]s in the [[Separatist Droid Army|Droid Army]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Spider-droid]]''', used by the [[Scourge]] to infect other droids
*'''Spider droids''' of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]'s [[Separatist Droid Army|Droid Army]]
**'''[[DSD1 dwarf spider droid]]
**'''[[OG-9 homing spider droid]]'''
*'''[[Spider probe droid]]''', a [[probe droid]] model used by the [[First Order]].
*'''[[Unidentified Spider probe droid]]''', an individual droid who served the First Order.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[B'omarr brain walker]]''', which housed the brains of [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr monks]] and were also referred to as '''spider droids'''
*'''[[Imperial spider droid]]''', security droids used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[Redkihl Rokk's spider droid]]''', used by [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Redkihl Rokk]]
*'''[[SPD-R4 spider droid]]''', Imperial [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droids]]
*'''[[TS-Arach series Pest Control Droid]]''', [[pest-control droid]]s manufactured by [[MerenData/Legends|MerenData]]
*The '''[[spider droid family]]''' used by the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]:
**[[A-DSD advanced dwarf spider droid]]
**[[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droid]]
**[[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|LM-432 crab droid]]
**[[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droid]]
**[[Unidentified spider droid]]

==See also==
*[[Spider (disambiguation)]]
